heading: Definitions
label: 3402 Definitions

children.heading: Federal agency
children.label: 1 Federal agency
children.text: The term “federal agency” has the same meaning given the term “agency” in .1section 551(1) of title 5So in original. Probably should be capitalized.1

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The terms “Indian tribe” and “tribe” have the meaning given the term “Indian tribe” in .section 5304 of this title

children.heading: Inclusion
children.label: B Inclusion
children.text: The term “Indian tribe” includes tribal organizations (as defined in ).section 5304 of this title

children.heading: Indian
children.label: 3 Indian
children.text: The term “Indian” shall have the meaning given such term in .section 5304(d) of this title

children.heading: Program
children.label: 4 Program
children.text: The term “program” means a program described in .section 3404(a) of this title

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 5 Secretary
children.text: Except where otherwise provided, the term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Interior.
